title: data types
text: data types Specify the file containing the data type specification. USYS$ODx_PARAMS = data types : ' FileName ' Arguments FileName —name of the file that contains the data type specification, enclosed within matching quotation marks ( ' or " ). If the file is not in the current directory, FileName must include the full path to the file. Note: USYS: and USYSADM: are permitted in the path and are expanded.
